text:
On Mon, Aug 22, 2011 at 08:00:29AM +0000, Chris Rees wrote:
>  Although it may need what's currently in www/p5-FCGI removing...
>  there're a few copies of it in the Attic ;)

Once there's something in the Attic, we don't do repocopies.

You'll need to check in the new versions of the files.  Anything else
would destroy history.

mcl
